title: Scape and Run Parasites Addon: Immalleable Generator
description: Added a block and a tool which can disable Adaptation of Parasites from Scape and Run: Parasites Mod.
body:
# [Discontinued] Scape and Run Parasites Addon: Immalleable Generator
**Warning:**  
1. **This Mod has stoped to update as I do not know what to update.**  
2. **Note: Due to significant changes made to the Damage Adaptation (and Immalleable Buff) mechanisms in SRP versions 1.10 and later, compatibility cannot be provided. Please use SRP versions prior to 1.10, or seek other alternative solutions.**  
## This mod requires Scape and Run: Parasites Mod and Allow Cheats.
**_Have you ever felt that the game gets harder and harder when [Evolution Phases](https://scape-and-run-parasites.fandom.com/wiki/Evolution_Phases) from [Scape and Run: Parasites](https://modrinth.com/mod/scapeandrunparasites) are have?_**  
**_Have you ever felt those Parasites with Damage Adaptation are awful and hard to kill as you are a noob?_**  
 If you think so, this mod may be helpful to you.
# Desciption
This Mod added a block and a tool which can disable Adaptation of Parasites around the block / player from Scape and Run: Parasites Mod in order to make it easier for noobs (like me) to keep alive in high Evolution Phasese.  
This Mod does not add recipes for these two items for now, but you send me your advice in this mod's Issues Tracker or add recipes with Mods like CraftTweaker if you are a Modpack Creator.
# Feathers
## Block (Immalleable Generator)
![Immalleable Generator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KVxamX2f/images/5c6b57cb3b44cf6dfdaa0d07a5425ab7d2094213.png)  
You can place this block on the ground and disable Adaptation of Parasites around (inside a circle of radius 64 blocks) the block by right clicking on it. It will disappear after you click it.  
## Tool (Immalleable Effect Wand)
![Immalleable Effect Wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KVxamX2f/images/e3f90b4fc8ea6e08d5d57f4df371dfc20a8819cc.png)  
You can hold it in main hand and right click to disable Adaptation of Parasites around (inside a circle of radius 64 blocks) the player. After use, there will be a cooldown for about 1 minute.  
# Supported Languages
- Chinese (Simplified);
- English (US);
- Russian (translated by DeepL).  


If you want to see the language you want in the Mod, please send me your translated language file in Issues Tracker!  
# License
As I used some of textures from the original Mod, this Mod is licensed under All rights reserved as well as the original Mod. You can add this Mod in your Modpacks.
# Credits
Dhanantry and the others for Scape and Run: Parasites.
# Others
These two items are essentially run commands like Command Block, so you need to turn on the Cheat Mode.  
This Mod is made with MCreator, for reasons that are well known, please make backups well in advance before you add them in your games.
